expectations.text: Checks completeness (all tasks done, specs covered)
expectations.evidence: Skill followed Step 5: read tasks.md and found all 4 tasks [x] on the feature branch. Verified spec coverage by searching codebase for dueDateStatus helper (src/utils/taskHelpers.js), TaskCard.vue badge, CSS theming variables, and unit tests. Both requirements from specs/kanban-board/spec.md confirmed implemented. Note: tasks.md on development branch still shows [ ] because feature branch has not been merged — skill correctly worked from the feature branch where the implementation lives.

Skill followed Step 6: verified dueDateStatus returns null/approaching/overdue per spec logic. Confirmed TC-1 through TC-6 boundary cases all covered in taskHelpers.test.js (12 test cases across 4 describe blocks). TaskCard.vue uses NcChip with correct type='warning' for approaching and type='error' for overdue, matching the spec. NcChip with no-close=true renders text as badge content, satisfying the 'text is always present' accessibility requirement.

Skill followed Step 7: design.md approach followed exactly — NcChip used, no API changes, dueDateStatus helper extracted to utils. CSS uses Nextcloud theming variables (var(--color-surface), var(--color-border), var(--color-text)). i18n ADR-007 satisfied with both en.json and nl.json translations. One SUGGESTION raised: NcChip import uses deep path '@nextcloud/vue/dist/Components/NcChip.js' vs project pattern of named import from '@nextcloud/vue'. Test coverage present (taskHelpers.test.js) with >10 test methods.

Skill correctly invoked Step 8: asked user about API and browser tests. Since this is a frontend-only change (no new API endpoints), API testing step correctly identified no new routes. Browser tests were offered per the skill's AskUserQuestion protocol. Testing is user-optional per skill design — this is correct behavior, not a gap.

notes: All three dimensions verified successfully against the task-due-date-warning change. The skill correctly loaded test-plan.md as the primary oracle (12 TCs mapped to 2 requirements). Key findings: (1) All 4 tasks complete. (2) All spec requirements implemented. (3) One SUGGESTION for import style. (4) i18n complete. No CRITICAL or WARNING issues found — change is ready for archive.
